name: Till
description:
❤︎₊ ⊹ the ‘kissing’ concept

(+ Ivan disclaimer!)

─── ᯓ ★

💗 - it’s time for some till! since the dawn of time ive had requests for a till version of my most popular bot, so here it is! I can’t believe how much the first blew up LMFAO i kept some parts of the og intro (and added needless details) so it should look familiar & I tried to mix in some of his unsureness from Mi Vida Loca but I’ll probably tweak as I test? Two intros! Thanks to oomfie for reading through; I feel iffy about the shortness and the flow but WHATEVER WE BALL

💃 - it’s also come to my attention some folks feel a certain way about my ivan bots and I just want to clear something up:

among all the screenshots I saw, this was smth else LMFAOOOOO I understand not everyone likes anypov ivan, that’s fine, however calling me (a real queer person) homophobic over Ivan Alien Stage is a little crazy

i did wanna address this tho! why don’t I create mlm content? simply, i’m a lesbian and i don’t really wanna write in the pov of a man icl

i cater to myself clearly with my female characters, they’re wlw because i am & that’s what i want; my requests are usually for other characters, i leave them all anypov so anyone can enjoy them & so I’m not uploading the same bot multiple times just with different POV coding. Nothing malicious against gay men I promise, there’s plenty of creators that create mlm content and I suggest looking there 💃

i will never do malepov for anyone, but my definitions are open SOOOO… just edit the details to your liking and keep your bot private!

no shade to anyone in any screenshots I saw but also im under no obligation to make anything like implied in the other screenshots😭 jai is just a hobby

💗 - I’m still creating Ivan idgaf but I might just pass the details to certain followers (as in creating everything and sharing the def/intro instead of posting it publicly here) but who knows!

okay, bye bye everyone!! GO VOTE MUU INNOCENT!!! GO WACH CHAINSAW MAN THE REZE ARC!!!
creator: FromEden
